title: Raymond James Rocks Its Record Book In 1st Quarter
text: Raymond James Financial Inc. ( RJF , Financial) began 2022 by reporting a host of record results for the company's fiscal first quarter, which ended Dec. 31, 2021 – and investors are taking notice.

title: New Strong Buy Stocks for January 28th
text: ABG, GM, LEN, ONEW, and RJF have been added to the Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy) List on January 28, 2022.

title: Raymond James (RJF) Q1 Earnings Top Estimates, Stock Up 9.7%
text: Higher revenues, provision benefit and a solid assets balance support Raymond James' (RJF) fiscal Q1 results.

title: What's in Store for Raymond James (RJF) in Q1 Earnings?
text: Raymond James (RJF) is expected to have recorded growth in investment banking fees in the first quarter of fiscal 2022 (ended Dec 31) as trading normalizes.

title: How Raymond (RJF) Stock Stands Out in a Strong Industry
text: Raymond (RJF) has seen solid earnings estimate revision activity over the past month, and belongs to a strong industry as well.

title: Raymond James Financial: Positive On Potential Rate Hikes
text: RJF's banking arm and its recently proposed acquisition targets are expected to benefit from rising net interest margins going forward, thanks to positive expectations of future rate hikes.

title: Why Raymond James Financial Jumped 57% in 2021
